name: Spritzgeback (Spritz Cookies)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and confectioners' sugar until light.
2. Add egg, egg yolk, and extract to the mixture; beat well.
3. Sift flour, salt, and baking powder together.
4. Gradually add the sifted flour mixture to the eggs.
5. Chill dough for 30 minutes.
6. Press 1/4 of the dough into a cookie press.
7. Keep remaining dough chilled.
8. Shape cookies onto a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F (200°C) for 7 to 10 minutes, or until done.
10. Cool on wire racks and store in airtight tins.
11. Makes 4 to 6 dozen cookies.
